content: Resilience engine retry/reroute decision (handleTaskFailure): analyzes RetryRecord.errorClass (recoverable|structural|unknown) + retry count vs config limits. Returns RerouteDecision with action: retry (clean worktree + respawn with backoff) | recommend_reroute (mail to parent) | abandon (kill only). Watchdog daemon.ts:1760-1840 implements reroute action dispatch.
